message:
chore(beads): Stop tracking beads files in main branch

Remove .beads/issues.jsonl and .beads/.local_version from git tracking.
These files are managed by the beads sync mechanism which uses a separate
beads-sync branch for synchronization. They were previously tracked but
are now properly gitignored.

The beads workflow uses `bd sync` to synchronize issue tracking data
through the beads-sync branch rather than committing directly to main.
This keeps the main branch history clean and focused on code changes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
